_comment: Mode B settings: declarative deny rules + dynamic guard hook. Layer 1 (deny rules) cannot be overridden by a hook allow; layer 2 (PreToolUse hook) blocks even in bypassPermissions. The hook matcher is "*" (match all tools), not "Bash": the guard also carries the HALT kill-switch, which must neutralise a run in flight across Edit/Write too, not only shell-outs. The guard is referenced by an absolute enforced path (/opt/harness/scripts/guard_pretooluse.py), never via the .harness/pack symlink or $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, so a worker cannot retarget the guard by moving a symlink or shadowing an env var (ADR-001 D3).
